name: Sonic The Hedgehog
description:
Wish you'd just talk to me!

━━━━⊱⋆⊰━━━━

Hi friends!!! I recently just adopted an obession over sonic the hedgehog and all the series around that (i can't be bothered waiting until 2027 for the 4th movie 😭)
ANYWAYYY
I based this bot over that one Charli XCX song bc yes ENJOY PEOPLEEEE (also this is based in sonic boom so ya)
Also if you want to rp as Amy you can but this is more suited to oc x canon :)
ALSO GUYS I TRIED ADDING TALK TALK (the song i based this bot on) BUT THE MUSIC MANIA SOUNDCLOUD THING WASN'T WORKING 😭😭 SO JUST LISTEN TO IT URSELF
Ok i swear thats it have fun!!!
